title: Plugin Metadata
description: Schema for entries in known_plugins.json. Required fields match the current shape; future optional fields are validated only when present.

natural_names.description: Phrases a user might say to refer to this plugin.

risk.description: Action-risk level used by the risky-gate.

has_card.description: Whether an operator card file exists for this plugin.

card_file.description: Relative path to the operator card (empty string if has_card=false).

parameter_map_file.description: (Future) Relative path to the JSON parameter map for this plugin.

generic_class_card_file.description: (Future) Relative path to a generic class card when no plugin-specific card exists.

operator_card_triggers.description: (Future) Intent keywords that should surface this plugin's operator card.

version.description: (Future) Plugin version string this entry was last verified against.

source_citations.description: (Future) Source document names or URLs that informed this entry.

pluginbridge_name.description: (Future) Exact name as it appears in the PluginBridge dropdown.
